headline: BofA Trims UPS Target as Analyst Flags Weaker Q1 Outlook
summary: United Parcel Service, Inc. (NYSE:UPS) is included among the 14 Stocks on the Verge of Becoming Dividend Aristocrats. On March 6, BofA lowered its price recommendation on United Parcel Service, Inc. (NYSE:UPS) to $112 from $118 and maintained a Neutral rating on the shares. The adjustment followed comments from UPS CFO Brian Dykes at an […]

headline: UPS Stock Is Deep in Oversold Territory. Should You Buy the Dip?
summary: Rising oil prices have weighed on United Parcel Service in recent days, but there’s reason for long-term investors to load up on UPS stock at current levels.

headline: Investing $1,000 in FedEx or UPS a Decade Ago Would Have Garnered How Much?
summary: FedEx (NYSE: FDX) and United Parcel Service (NYSE: UPS) have long served as proxies for the American economy. When packages move, consumers are spending and businesses are shipping. But over the past several years, these two logistics titans have taken sharply different paths, and the results for investors could not be more divergent. FedEx spent ... Investing $1,000 in FedEx or UPS a Decade Ago Would Have Garnered How Much?

headline: Is UPS’s (UPS) Capital-Heavy Network an Edge or Liability as Energy and AI Costs Shift?
summary: In early March 2026, United Parcel Service, Inc. participated in the 47th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference in Orlando, presenting its latest business outlook to institutional investors. At the same time, UPS’s role as a capital-intensive, hard-to-replicate logistics network has been emphasized by analysts as particularly relevant amid concerns about how AI and energy costs could reshape transportation businesses. With oil prices placing fresh attention on UPS’s cost...
